home.name: Henrique
home.role: Building scalable web and mobile softwares focused on performance and accessible design.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Software engineering with care for the details.
about.content: Software Developer specializing in TypeScript and modern JavaScript frameworks, with solid experience building scalable web and mobile applications using React, React Native, Next.js, and Vue.js. Experienced in creating high-performance interfaces, implementing responsive and accessible user interfaces, and collaborating effectively within agile, cross-functional teams. Strong focus on clean architecture, maintainable code, and delivering user-centered digital experiences.
about.secondary: Based in Salzwedel, Germany — open to relocation. Experience across fintech platforms in digital banking and cryptocurrency, reusable UI components with Storybook, and close collaboration with backend and product teams in agile environments.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools I use to ship modern systems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of recent work.
projects.instruction: A focused selection of projects exploring product UI, design systems, and full-stack experiments. Open the live demo or browse the source on GitHub.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's build something together.
contact.intro: Open to front-end opportunities, freelance projects, and collaborations. I usually respond within a business day.
